properties.name: Taytay
properties.derivation: intersect(buffer(15km), nearest-coast Voronoi region) - union(all land)
properties.note: Legal municipal waters: 15 km seaward, partitioned by the median (equidistance) line between adjacent municipalities. Non-overlapping (RA 7160 §131 / RA 8550 IRR / NAMRIA).
